findings.title: Unhandled ai.run() exception in rubric-scorer (FIXED)
findings.issue: scoreRubric() called ai.run() without try/catch. CF AI transient errors would crash the entire V2 pipeline.
findings.suggestion: Wrap ai.run() in try/catch returning DEFAULT_SCORE on failure.
findings.impact: Fixed in-session. Added try/catch around ai.run() returning DEFAULT_SCORE on error.

findings.title: Sequential LLM calls in V2 pipeline (performance consideration)
findings.issue: REVERIFY with 5 prompts x 5 runs = 100 sequential LLM calls per skill. Could take 5-10 minutes.
findings.suggestion: Future optimization: parallelize runs within a single prompt since they are independent.
findings.impact: Within CF Workers 15-minute queue timeout. No functional issue, performance acceptable for launch.
